sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63433" key="linoulko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐν-ουλκός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἕλκω</etym>) <sense id="n63433.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of spun flax</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χλαῖνα</foreign> Ion Trag. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope> </bibl> (<orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λινόκλως</orth> cj. Lobeck).</sense> </entryFree>
